data_description.username: The email address associated with your Eufy account.
data_description.password: The password used to log in to the Eufy app.

data_description.selected_vacuum: Choose the Eufy RoboVac device you wish to configure from the list of discovered vacuums.

edit.title: Edit vacuum

data_description.autodiscovery: Automatically find the vacuum on the network.
data_description.ip_address: The static IP address of your vacuum on your local network (optional if autodiscovery is enabled).
data_description.room_segment_map_id: The map ID used when cleaning configured room segments.
data_description.room_segments: Comma-separated room segments in id:name format, for example 1:Kitchen,2:Living Room.

edit.description: Autodiscovery will automatically update the IP address
